prestazioni: Engine: 2.0L TFSI (EA888 Gen3 - **DKZ** engine code) with **APR Stage 2+ ECU/TCU Software** (380 HP / 480 Nm) paired with **Garrett GT2867R .86 A/R turbocharger** and **Precision Turbo 46mm wastegate** for optimized spool and reduced lag, utilizing **Methaform M1 Methanol Injection Kit** (50/50 water-methanol mix) to suppress detonation under high boost (24 PSI peak)

Drivetrain: **034 Motorsport Hybrid Limited-Slip Differential (LSD)** with 45% lockup under load, mated to a **South Bend Clutch Stage 3 Daily** (organic/copper hybrid disc) and **034 Motorsport Transmission Mount Insert** to eliminate torque steer and drivetrain deflection

Suspension: **KW Clubsport 3-Way Coilovers** (24-way rebound, 12-way compression, adjustable top mounts) with **H&R 25mm Front / 20mm Rear Anti-Roll Bars** and **SuperPro Polyurethane Bushings (Full Kit)** for razor-sharp turn-in, paired with **Audi Sport S3-spec 340mm front brake rotors** and **Ferodo DS2500 pads** for fade-resistant stopping power
estetica: **Rieger Tuning RS3-Style Front Bumper** (carbon fiber weave, integrated **Morr M10 80mm Tow Hooks**), with **Maxton Design S-Line Side Skirts** (painted in **Nardo Grey with satin black lower accents**) and **Audi Sport Rear Diffuser (8V S3 part #8V0-807-511-A)** for OEM+ aggression

**Vorsteiner V-FF107 19x9.5 ET35 / 19x10.5 ET40 Forged Wheels** (matte gunmetal finish, 5x112 PCD) wrapped in **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 Connect (245/35 R19 / 265/30 R19)** for maximum mechanical grip, paired with **H&R TRAK+ Wheel Spacers (15mm front, 20mm rear)** to fill the arches

**OEM+ Lighting Upgrade**: **Lux H8 V4 LED Headlights** (6000K, CRI 90+) with **Morimoto XB35 LED Fog Lights**, **VLEDS 3rd Brake Light LED Strip**, and **Audi Sport S3 Taillights (OEM part #8V0-945-095/096)** smoked with **Vinyl Depot 20% Tint Overlay** for a stealthy, high-end look
